payload.query: How has our understanding of the relationship between economic conditions and democratization changed over the years? Identify major strains of thought, not solely regarding development, but also other economic conditions. Explain the relationship between these strains of work to one another. What do you see as the next significant development in the study of economic conditions and democratization? Reference recent work to support this.

articles.title: Read the Decision
articles.abstract: A federal judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration from ending Temporary Protected Status for more than 350,000 Haitians in the United States.

articles.title: Read the appeals court ruling on Trump’s tariffs.
